title: Prefer non-pseudorandom number generators when security is a concern
description: Using pseudorandom number generators (PRNGs) can lead to predictable results, which might be a security concern in some cases.
message: Consider using a cryptographically secure random number generator instead.
recommendation: Use cryptographically secure random number generators such as os.urandom() or secrets.token_hex()

references.text: Official Python documentation on secrets module
Wikipedia article on random number generation

why_is_this_an_issue: Predictable results can be exploited in some security scenarios.
how_to_fix: Use a cryptographically secure random number generator.

metadata.title: Prefer non-pseudorandom number generators when security is a concern
